About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department is responsible for providing education to the citizens of Uttar Pradesh, India.

As per official notification, the department has released a recruitment notification for ECCE Educators.

About the Programme

The ECCE Educator Recruitment programme is an outsourcing recruitment programme for Indian citizens.

The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates as ECCE Educators in Uttar Pradesh, India.
